title: Nintendogs
facts: Nintendogs bounded onto Nintendo DS in 2005 and turned the touchscreen into a puppy-petting command center. Players teach tricks through the microphone, enter competitions, and discover that virtual dogs are just as talented at ignoring instructions as real ones. The game launched in several breed-based versions, ensuring playground debates could now include highly serious Labrador diplomacy. It is less about winning than accepting that your pocket console has become a tiny apartment full of barking responsibilities.
